name: TickTick
description: TickTick task management platform. Create, update, complete, and find tasks across projects.

credential_fields.name: accessToken
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: TickTick OAuth access token (via TickTick Open API OAuth flow)

tools.name: find_tasks
tools.description: Retrieve all tasks from a specific project in TickTick. Returns a list of task objects including their IDs, titles, content, due dates, priorities, and completion status. Use the projectId to scope results to a particular project.

projectId.description: The ID of the project (list) to retrieve tasks from. Use the TickTick project endpoints to discover available project IDs.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in TickTick. Provide a title and optionally set content, due date, priority, project assignment, and more. Returns the created task object with its assigned ID.

content.description: The text content or description of the task.

projectId.description: The ID of the project (list) to add the task to. If omitted, the task is added to the Inbox.

startDate.description: The start date of the task in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2025-01-15T09:00:00+0000).

dueDate.description: The due date of the task in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2025-01-20T17:00:00+0000).

timeZone.description: The timezone for the task dates (e.g. America/New_York).

priority.description: Task priority level. 0 = none, 1 = low, 3 = medium, 5 = high.

isAllDay.description: Whether the task is an all-day task. Defaults to false.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task in TickTick. Modify the title, content, due date, priority, or other properties of a task. Both taskId and projectId are required to identify the task. Returns the updated task object.

taskId.description: The unique ID of the task to update.

projectId.description: The ID of the project (list) the task belongs to.

content.description: Updated text content or description of the task.

startDate.description: Updated start date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2025-01-15T09:00:00+0000).

dueDate.description: Updated due date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2025-01-20T17:00:00+0000).

timeZone.description: The timezone for the task dates (e.g. America/New_York).

priority.description: Updated task priority level. 0 = none, 1 = low, 3 = medium, 5 = high.

isAllDay.description: Whether the task is an all-day task.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as complete in TickTick. Requires both the projectId and taskId to identify the task. The task will be moved to the completed state.

projectId.description: The ID of the project (list) the task belongs to.

taskId.description: The unique ID of the task to mark as complete.
